settings.title: Our Expanded Free Weights Area Is Open
settings.excerpt: We have doubled the platform space and added two new squat racks so you stop waiting around at peak times.
settings.body:
The free weights corner at Olympic has been busy to the point of frustration, especially in the evening rush. So we knocked through into the old studio space and rebuilt it.

You now have two extra squat racks, a second deadlift platform, and a full set of dumbbells running up in smaller increments so you can progress sensibly.

What is new on the floor

The rebuild was about more than space. We wanted the area to work properly during the busy hours, so the layout was planned around how people actually move between lifts. Here is what you will find:

  • Two additional squat racks, taking the total to a point where the evening wait should disappear.
  • A second deadlift platform, so two people can pull at once without crowding.
  • Dumbbells in smaller jumps, which makes steady progress far easier.

We have kept the chalk bowls and added more mirrors at lifting height. The flooring is proper rubber matting that will not bounce your plates around.

A quick word on sharing racks

With more racks comes a gentle ask. At peak times, please let someone work in between your sets if they need to, and clear your plates when you are done. The extra space only stays pleasant if we all keep it tidy.

Come and try it out. Evenings should feel a lot less crowded from now on.
